# claudeplatform_organization_invite (Resource)

An invitation to join the organization. Invites expire server-side after 21 days; an expired or accepted invite is not recreated automatically (status is tracked as an attribute).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Email address to invite.
- `role` (String) Organization role granted on acceptance.

### Read-Only

- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `invited_at` (String)
- `status` (String) Invite status (e.g. pending, accepted, expired).
